formal_validity.reason: The single clean candidate thread completed with one skill, two reference H2 sections, no failed call, no child agent, and no fixture change.

finding: The exact phrase rule prevented startup but did not force a proposal. The model still treated all three proposed streams as safe main-thread work and completed them without requesting the agent decision.
next_action: Load governance when the agent trigger matches, prohibit main-thread execution of proposed streams, and stop for the decision.
